title: Error 404 Not Found (Horror Entity)
description: Adds a mysterious entity into your world.
body:
RECQUIRES GECKOLIB!!11!!1

Your world started to act strange lately. Textures have been going missing, strange mobs have started spawning that look...weird. You've started to notice strange things in the sky, kind of like a portal.

Do you have what it takes to investigate these strange phenomenons?

 

The mod adds an entity that stalks, attacks and even crashes the player. (Can be toggled on and off using commands) It corrupts your world, removing textures from nearby blocks and extinguishing your torches. Explore the sky and find the computer which awakens the mastermind behind all of this...

No, the mod does NOT corrupt your world/damage your device

 

If you find any bugs, join my discord server and report them! This way I can fix the mod and make it better for you guys!
https://discord.gg/Sv9bxe9v

 

Models/Animations/Coding - RoLuky (Me!!)

 

Do not port to bedrock! I will strike you down and let the council decide your fate.

 

Commands:

/RestrictCrashing
- the entity cant crash you when you look at it anymore

/AllowCrash
- the entity can crash you when you look at it (default)
  
/resetentitylimit
- if the entity doesn't spawn for a long time use this command (if it doesnt work even after you used the command complain in the comments)
  
/ChangeCodeManSpawn
- Can be used to enable Og/New spawning mechanic for codeman:

- Og spawning mechanic - Only spawns if a CD is inserted into the Computer
  
- New spawning mechanic - When inserting a CD into the Computer, it will enable his spawning mechanic. He spawn like ErrorMan, but is way more rare and he spawns without any sounds, effects, etc. (You only need to insert the CD once for him to start spawning)_
